description.content: Operations for posting digital interaction data
Posts a digital interaction event to Gong, recording structured data about digital communications such as emails, chat messages, or other text-based interactions with customers.

Operations for reporting customer engagement events
Reports a content sharing event to Gong, tracking when a user shares content (such as documents, presentations, or links) with a prospect or customer.
